title: PaxStressia edges file (rules/edges.json)
description: Edges between region nodes per DESIGN.md §4: borders, smuggling routes, ethnic ties, sea lanes, diaspora links. The networking premise lives here. Edges are targetable (interdiction is a runtime field, engine-owned) but never fully closable.

capacity.description: Flow capacity for fighters/arms/funding (0–1); feeds ExternalSupport route_factor (§18.5).
